zh.lifeSummary: Lady Sophie Townsend出生在英國波藍德布藍普頓。她於大約1506年與Richard Smythe de Elye在英國英格蘭波藍德布藍普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1539年11月9日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾武特比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Sophie Townsend出生在英国波藍德布藍普頓。她于大约1506年与Richard Smythe de Elye在英国英格兰波藍德布藍普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1539年11月9日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾武特比。

nameMeanings.name: Townsend
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived at the extremity of a village, from Middle English toun(es)ende. Compare Town . There may have been some confusion with Townson .

variants.name: Town
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Kent): topographic name from Middle English toun(e), t(h)one, tun(e) ‘town, village, settlement’ (Old English tūn), often in the senses ‘primary settlement within an area’, ‘manor, estate’, and ‘hamlet, farm’, for someone who lived in such a place.

variants.name: Townzen
meanings: English: probably an altered form of   Townsend  .

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Sophie Townsend was born in Brampton, Cumberland, England. She married Richard Smythe de Elye about 1506, in Brampton, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 9 November 1539, in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Sophie Townsend est née à Brampton, Cumberland, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Smythe d’Elye environ 1506, à Brampton, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 novembre 1539, à Utterby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Sophie Townsend wurde in Brampton, Cumberland, England geboren. Sie hat um 1506 in Brampton, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Richard Smythe de Elye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. November 1539 in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Sophie Townsend è nata il nel Brampton, Cumberland, England. Lei sposato Richard Smythe de Elye circa 1506, nel Brampton, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1539, nel Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Sophie Townsendはイギリスクウンバーランドブランプトンで生まれた。約1506年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドブランプトンでRichard Smythe de Elyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1539年11月9日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウッテルビーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Sophie Townsend(은)는 영국 c벌랜드 브램프턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 브램프턴에서 Richard Smythe de Elye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1539년 11월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 우터비에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Sophie Townsend nasceu em Brampton, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Smythe de Elye aproximadamente 1506, em Brampton, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1539, em Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Sophie Townsend родилась в местности брамптон, кумбирланд, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Smythe de Elye около 1506 г. в местности брамптон, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 9 ноября 1539 г. в местности уттирби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Sophie Townsend nació en Brampton, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard Smythe de Elye aproximadamente 1506, en Brampton, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1539, en Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
